message:
test: wave 12 – 84 new data-type tests across 6 modules

http/h1/types.rs (16 new):
  Method Display/Debug/Clone/Hash/from_bytes all standard+invalid utf8,
  Version Display/Debug/Copy/Hash, Request Debug/Clone/peer_addr,
  Response with_trailer/Debug/Clone/defaults, default_reason all known

observability/metrics.rs (17 new):
  Counter name/Debug, Gauge sub/name/Debug/negative,
  Histogram name/Debug/empty/bucket sorting,
  MetricValue Debug/Copy/Clone, OutcomeKind Debug/Copy/Eq/Hash,
  NoOpMetrics Debug/Default/Copy/Clone,
  Metrics Default empty/same-name counter+gauge/export histogram

messaging/kafka_consumer.rs (20 new):
  AutoOffsetReset Default/Debug/Copy/Eq,
  IsolationLevel Default/Debug/Copy/Eq,
  ConsumerConfig Debug/Clone/new/builder methods/validate edge cases,
  TopicPartitionOffset Debug/Clone/Eq/inequality,
  ConsumerRecord Debug/Clone/no-key, KafkaConsumer Debug/config/reject

record/obligation.rs (12 new):
  SourceLocation Display/unknown/Debug/Copy/Eq,
  ObligationKind Display/as_str/Debug/Copy/Hash/Ord,
  ObligationAbortReason Display/Debug/Copy/Eq,
  ObligationState Debug/Copy/Eq, ObligationRecord defaults/Debug

lab/oracle/obligation_leak.rs (10 new):
  ObligationLeak Display/Debug/Clone/Eq,
  ObligationLeakViolation Display/Debug/Clone/Error,
  Oracle Default/Debug/reset/counts/no-leak-without-close/aborted-ok

obligation/session_types.rs (9 new):
  Branch Debug/Copy/Eq, SessionProof Debug,
  ReserveMsg/AbortMsg Debug/Clone, Selected Left/Right,
  Chan accessors, lease obligation_kind

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
